{ "name": "egulias/email-validator", "description": "A library for validating emails against several RFCs", "homepage": "https://github.com/egulias/EmailValidator", "keywords": ["email", "validation", "validator", "emailvalidation", "emailvalidator"], "license": "MIT", "authors": [ {"name": "Eduardo Gulias Davis"} ], "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "4.0.x-dev" } }, "require": { "php": ">=8.1", "doctrine/lexer": "^2.0 || ^3.0", "symfony/polyfill-intl-idn": "^1.26" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^10.2", "vimeo/psalm": "^5.12" }, "suggest": { "ext-intl": "PHP Internationalization Libraries are required to use the SpoofChecking validation" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Egulias\\EmailValidator\\": "src" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Egulias\\EmailValidator\\Tests\\": "tests" } } }
